title: Colymbada amblensis
taxonomy: Colymbada amblensis is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the aster family, known as Asteraceae. This plant belongs to the genus Colymbada. The genus Colymbada is a group of plants closely related to the genus Hieracium, which includes hawkweeds. Colymbada amblensis is also known by its synonym Hieracium amblense. It is primarily classified based on its botanical characteristics, including its leaf and flower morphology.

It is often used to treat digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, due to its carminative properties.
